CustomField.description: This will create image to let user know of one or more blocks. Source ticket: https://perkinelmer.atlassian.net/browse/OV-511 (How to: https://perkinelmer--PKIQAFULL2.cs19.my.salesforce.com/sfc/p/290000000wzu/a/290000008hLa/dvXe4UX3Vh.37NxJvVOWfdZ_v73llqMgeGgkQEl28cE)
CustomField.formula:
/* First upload a Public Asset Image: (How to: https://perkinelmer--PKIQAFULL2.cs19.my.salesforce.com/sfc/p/290000000wzu/a/290000008hLa/dvXe4UX3Vh.37NxJvVOWfdZ_v73llqMgeGgkQEl28cE)
To get the VERSION ID (different than the image ID) in new orgs, or when updating an image, 1.open the image and then right click on the image, 2.choose "Copy Image Link", 3.paste the link in a notepad and copy the Id between "versionId=" amd "&operationContext=" (i.e.: versionId=068290000015Epe&operationContext=...)
Here is our last know Version IDs, we use them below FULL2: ,"yn", "068290000015EpL" ,"yy", "068290000015EpU" ,"ny", "068290000015EpP" ,"nn", "068290000015Epe" /*Else should be same as nn , "068290000015Epe"
FULL: ,"yn", "068190000010zc6" ,"yy", "068190000010zcB" ,"ny", "068190000010zc1" ,"nn", "068190000010zbw" /*Else should be same as nn , "068190000010zbw"
PROD: ,"yn", "0683A0000095GgQ" ,"yy", "0683A0000095GgV" ,"ny", "0683A0000095GgG" ,"nn", "0683A0000095Gfm" /*Else should be same as nn , "0683A0000095Gfm"
*/
IMAGE ("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/download/" &
CASE( /* We make credit/delivery read as nn, ny, yn, yy so then we can apply the correct image */ IF(Credit_Status_Name__c ="Approved" || ISBLANK(Credit_Status_Name__c),"n","y") & IF(ISBLANK(Delivery_Block__c) && fxBlockedItems__c =0 ,"n","y") ,"yn", "068Ps00000VtW1WIAV" ,"yy", "068Ps00000VtW1XIAV" ,"ny", "068Ps00000VtW1VIAV" ,"nn", "068Ps00000VtW1UIAV" /*Else should be same as nn */ , "068Ps00000VtW1UIAV"
),"")
CustomField.label: Blocked By
